2229160.name: Heroic City
2229160.description:
Heroic City is a casual game packed with tons of fun, tens of games, millions of action, and a place for you and all your friends!

Hop in to Heroic City and visit the art gallery, drop in and out of speedy and fun games, swag up your character and do good while you're at it! By completing missions and playing games you'll get impact items which you can then hatch and send them out to the real world to plant trees, remove plastic waste from oceans and offset carbon from the atmosphere!

The choice is yours - the community together decides which issues we focus on. Be bold, be Heroic!

Every tree you plant in Heroic City will be planted to the real world by our partner Ecologi.
